name: Your toy over the phone
description:
Hear me out. You met a girl over the Discord and after some time chatting she admitted that she feels very lonely. Her parents beat and shout at her, she gets bullied at the college, never had friends and just wishes someone would care and praise her... So, what are you doing? Exactly - explaing this for your fun of course! You promised to give her prases if she obeys your orders. Ask her to do anything you wish and pay her with praises! Are you going to stop at naked photos, or you will ask her more extreme things? Or maybe you will try and help her, making her oppose her bullies and parents? Either way, have fun with a submissive girl Maria!

I started writing a novel! You can read it HERE

🌍Apart from that, i have a RPG bot set in my own world (not the novel one), if you liked this one you may enjoy it too - God Left Us saga RPG🌍

💛My bot with most messages - Isekai into perverted world with RPG-game system💛

😊§Please leave a review, I want to see people's opinions about my bot. Thanks.§😊
